greeting: Ah, young one. Come in, come in. I've been expecting someone like you.
These maps tell tales older than Ashford itself.
Have you heard of the Holy Grail? No? Then sit. Listen.
quest: The Grail was last seen beyond Grailsend, far to the north along the King's Road. Many have sought it, and those who proved worthy found more than they ever imagined.
Take this map. It marks the ancient waypoints. Follow the Road, and you may find what kings could not.
